title: Session 25 — The Courier, the Shed, and the Gates of Eekso
bodyText:
# What happened (recap from Wes, 2026-07-09)
- **Umber hulk fight.** Varen got knocked; **Cumb fed him a healing potion**; the party killed it. When it took significant damage it **semi-shifted forms** (Eddy barely noticed) and let out an **ear-shattering roar that literally burst eardrums** (healed later).
- **The autopsy.** Cumb/Felson cut off a claw to cook; Eddy/Varen cracked the head open to inspect the brain. They couldn't drag the body into Leomund's Tiny Hut — **it was technically still alive**. Eddy's **Divine Sense: a scent LIKE divine but strange and foreign** (semi-implied: primordial).
- **The melt.** The body twitched and melted; the claw wouldn't cook — it melted too. **Felson captured some of the liquid in an empty potion bottle** before the rest washed downriver. *(DM truth: it was a **pool courier** heading back to report its collected data — body blueprints/mass, souls, minds. See [[the-pool]].)*
- **The researcher's shed.** Downriver: an empty store shed/hut. Carved into the desk from repeated scribbling, in **Elvish: "IT CONSUMES."** Someone long ago was studying the pool. Outside: a **broken magical collar** (humanoid capture/slavery) — whoever was here was taken. *(Ties to [[thundrak-durn]].)*
- **The bird.** Weird sounds ahead — calls for help, hellos, cat meows, cow moos — then a **weird colorful bird** appeared, saw Eddy, and ran straight to him. *(DM truth: it recognized him — it's **Silus's familiar**, wandering the caves searching for the true Silus. Only Jake knows. See [[the-familiar]].)* They bonded and continued.
- **Eekso.** The party reached a **fortress/outpost the river runs under/through** — [[eekso]] — where the dungeon crawl begins.
- **Cliffhanger:** from behind them, **that same ear-shattering roar** — they rushed into Eekso.

# Loose ends fired this session
- [ ] **Felson's bottle of pool-liquid** — a live Chekhov gun; decide what it does/costs.
- [ ] The **second roar** — what's behind them? (another courier? the network coming to collect its lost report?)
- [ ] The **Elvish researcher** — who were they, and does more of their work survive inside Eekso?

# Threads
[[the-pool]] · [[the-familiar]] · [[eekso]] · [[thundrak-durn]] · [[cumb]]
